content:
—————

gonna read Bruce’s autobiography
gonna work with my hands
gonna work on music—finish editing album—put together a demo of songs to work on with gabe—finish website (finally hopefully)
gonna do community service
gonna relax
gonna write—email ccing all the mods about agreeing on one story about the creation myth—poem on the creation myth—work on reworking the stories i started before—put together a reading list for becka—send becka work
gonna edit this semesters pieces
review to do list, create new goals
context: From document: Fiction creates distance from reality, allowing me to try and assume… — chunk 4 (chunk 4/4)
